5.0 out of 5 stars Absolutely fantastic product! Alice Johnson Reviewed in the United States on January 10, 2024 I've been using this product for about a month now and I'm very impressed. The build quality is excellent, the battery life exceeds expectations, and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Highly recommend to anyone looking for premium earbuds. The spatial audio feature works seamlessly with my iPhone and the transparency mode is very natural sounding. Worth every penny!
2.0 out of 5 stars Disappointed with the fit Bob Smith Reviewed in the United States on February 5, 2024 The sound quality is decent but the earbuds keep falling out of my ears no matter which tip size I use. For the price point, I expected a more secure fit. Also, the case scratches very easily. Returned after a week of trying to make them work. Customer service was helpful with the return at least.
4.0 out of 5 stars Great but not perfect Carol Davis Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2024 Overall a solid product. The noise cancellation works well in most environments. I took off one star because the call quality could be better - people on the other end sometimes complain about wind noise. Battery life is good though, easily lasting through my workday. The new USB-C charging is a welcome upgrade.
1.0 out of 5 stars Stopped working after 2 weeks Dave Wilson Reviewed in the United States on December 20, 2023 Left earbud completely died after just two weeks of use. Won't charge, won't connect. Very disappointing for a premium product at this price. Going through the warranty process now but this should not happen with a brand new product. I've had cheaper earbuds last years without issues.
5.0 out of 5 stars Best upgrade from the original AirPods Eve Martinez Reviewed in the United States on January 25, 2024 Coming from the original AirPods, these are a massive upgrade in every way. The noise cancellation is impressive, the sound quality is rich and detailed, and they're incredibly comfortable for long listening sessions. The adaptive transparency mode is a game changer. Integration with my Apple devices is seamless as expected. Can't imagine going back to regular earbuds.
